checks.name: cli_help
checks.stdout_tail:
el-finetune,model-calibrate,model-card,recommend,recommend-ui,experiment-template,campaign-prepare,campaign-analyze,failure-analysis,mvp-governance,repro-lock,repro-check,smoke-check,segment-train,extract-trajectories,feature-qa,label-correction,pipeline}
                         ...

Unified CLI for INTERACT-Morph MVP data/simulation workflows.

positional arguments:
  {inventory,handoff-check,ingest,validate,split,baseline,snapshot,sim-plan,sim-generate,sim-realism,model-train,model-finetune,model-calibrate,model-card,recommend,recommend-ui,experiment-template,campaign-prepare,campaign-analyze,failure-analysis,mvp-governance,repro-lock,repro-check,smoke-check,segment-train,extract-trajectories,feature-qa,label-correction,pipeline}
    inventory           MVP-004: Build raw-run inventory CSV.
    handoff-check       MVP-004/005/006: Check raw handoff readiness before
                        canonical ingest.
    ingest              MVP-005: Ingest raw runs into canonical layout.
    validate            MVP-006: Validate canonical dataset artifacts.
    split               MVP-008: Create train/val/test split artifact.
    baseline            MVP-009: Run baseline regime-map benchmark.
    snapshot            MVP-007: Snapshot dataset manifest/index.
    sim-plan            MVP-015/016: Plan axisymmetric simulation sweep.
    sim-generate        MVP-017: Generate synthetic simulation corpus.
    sim-realism         MVP-018: Build simulation realism report.
    model-train         MVP-020: Train/evaluate config-driven multimodal model
                        baseline.
    model-finetune      MVP-022: Fine-tune multimodal model on experimental
                        Family A data from a pretrained checkpoint artifact.
    model-calibrate     MVP-023: Calibrate model uncertainty from prediction
                        artifacts.
    model-card          MVP-024: Generate standardized model card markdown.
    recommend           MVP-025/026/027: Rank next experiments with objective
                        + acquisition + guardrails.
    recommend-ui        MVP-030: Build standalone HTML UI from recommendation
                        report artifacts.
    experiment-template
                        MVP-031: Convert recommendation report into operator
                        execution template.
    campaign-prepare    MVP-032/033: Prepare primary/robustness campaign plan
                        + append-ready run log template.
    campaign-analyze    MVP-034: Compare model-guided vs baseline campaign
                        outcomes and reduction.
    failure-analysis    MVP-035: Build failure-mode taxonomy report from
                        prediction artifacts.
    mvp-governance      MVP-038/039/040: Build internal handoff pack, go/no-go
                        memo, and post-MVP roadmap draft.
    repro-lock          MVP-036: Export pinned environment lockfile from
                        pyproject dependency groups.
    repro-check         MVP-036: Verify deterministic model train/eval outputs
                        under repeated identical runs.
    smoke-check         MVP-028/029/036/037: Run local parser, syntax, and
                        smoke-test verification bundle.
    segment-train       MVP-011: Train/validate lightweight interface
                        segmentation baseline and QC report.
    extract-trajectories
                        MVP-012: Extract contour-derived trajectories into
                        derived-features artifacts.
    feature-qa          MVP-013: Build derived-feature QA dashboard with
                        sanity/outlier checks.
    label-correction    MVP-014: Build prioritized active label/error-
                        correction queue from QC and QA artifacts.
    pipeline            MVP-029: Run canonical Family A workflow (ingest ->
                        validate -> split -> baseline -> snapshot).

optional arguments:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit

checks.name: handoff_check
checks.stdout_tail:
READY: 120/120 run directories ready
Wrote handoff check report -> data/canonical/family_a/manifests/reports/data_handoff_check_placeholder_v1.json
Recommended run-id mode: preserve
Next actions:
- [P0] Run the first canonical pipeline using the recommended run-ID mode.
  interact-morph pipeline --source-dir data/simulation/family_a/corpus/smoke_model_train_v1/runs --dataset-root data/canonical/family_a --run-id-mode preserve --require-labels --require-derived
- [P1] Attach the handoff report and generated pipeline artifacts to the governance evidence list before operator review.
